extractor_judge_boundary.description: An LLM may be used as the claim extractor (prose to structured claim). The verifier's truth label (SUPPORTED | REFUTED | UNVERIFIABLE) must never invoke an LLM. This boundary is the PROVE/ViCrit non-circularity defense: the checker's correctness is grounded in a programmatic oracle over a measured signal, not any model's opinion.

proposition.description: Free-text source claim from the teacher's prose output.

dimension.description: Musical dimension the claim is about.

location.description: Bar-range [bar_start, bar_end] (inclusive) or 'whole_piece'. Beat granularity is not admissible.

polarity.description: +: signed anomaly in the positive direction. -: signed anomaly in the negative direction. neutral: asserts a virtue or absence-of-problem.

magnitude.description: Optional. When present, tightens the check. When null, falls back to sign+tolerance check.

timing.notes: Tolerance is a percent deviation from established_tempo over the region, NOT absolute onset-ms. This is robust to alignment jitter.

pedaling.notes: Coarse on/off and density only. Half-pedal and flutter pedaling are out of scope. reference is self_density: fraction of bars with at least one pedal event in the same piece.

dynamics.rationale: No audio-domain loudness estimator exists in the repo (only MIDI velocity, which is not perceived loudness). Gate: rms_lufs_estimator must be validated before this dimension is admissible. Relative within-region loudness only; absolute dB is inadmissible because recording gain is uncontrolled.

articulation.rationale: AMT offsets are weaker than onsets (higher quantization error). Gate: offset_accuracy_validation must confirm offset reliability before this dimension is admissible. Region-level only; single-bar articulation claims are too fragile.

phrasing.rationale: Perceptual. The only available proxy is itself a perceptual model output, which reintroduces circularity.

interpretation.rationale: Definitionally subjective. No deterministic physical oracle exists.

timbre.rationale: No physical proxy. Timbre is a multi-dimensional perceptual construct with no single measurable correlate in the available signal chain.

dispatch_order: 2. If dimension.status == 'gated_on_measurement' and gate not validated -> UNVERIFIABLE(gated_dim)
3. If location is not resolvable (no score in catalog / piece not identified / span < alignment_uncertainty) -> UNVERIFIABLE(unlocalizable)
4. If measurement substrate raised an error -> UNVERIFIABLE(substrate_failure)
5. If region has fewer than dimension.minimum_events -> UNVERIFIABLE(region_too_short)
6. Compute signed deviation d vs reference
8. If d confirms polarity direction beyond tau -> SUPPORTED
verdict_spec.span_vs_uncertainty_failsafe: Verifier must downgrade to UNVERIFIABLE(unlocalizable) when alignment_uncertainty >= location_span. location_span = bar_end - bar_start + 1 for bar-range; undefined (infinite) for whole_piece.
verdict_spec.note: UNVERIFIABLE claims are never folded into faithfulness or coverage. They are reported as a separate histogram by typed reason code.
